title: Swallowing Issues in Stroke Victims: 7 Herbal Tinctures for Support
description: Ligusticum wallichii tinctures have been traditionally used to help with difficulty swallowing, also known as dysphagia. This herb, also known as Chuanxiong or Szechuan lovage, contains compounds like ligustilide, senkyunolide, and butylphthalide, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. These constituents have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce swelling and improve blood flow to the throat and esophagus, making it easier to swallow. If you're...
